content.en:
The number one on the list of all things, this is enough to make the entire Dark Sanctuary famous.

Of course, there are many firsts in the Dark Sanctuary, and there are many firsts in the list of all things, and I don't know how many firsts in the list of all things have been born.

But Ye Tian, the number one on the list of all things, has a very heavy gold content, because he has not only cultivated the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, but also is the inheritor of the Extreme Dao, which makes him far more than the first place on the list of all things in the past.

When Ye Tian became the number one on the list of all things, one force after another sent invitations to Ye Tian, and many of them were holy places.

But Ye Tian ignored these forces, his target was only the Ten Great Holy Gates, and only the Ten Great Holy Gates could attract him.

The ten supreme holy gates of the Dark Sanctuary are the Battle Gate, the Firmament Holy Gate, the All Things Holy Gate, the Immortal Holy Gate, the Heaven-Shattering Holy Gate, the Immortal Holy Gate, the Holy Maiden Gate, the Golden Bell Holy Gate, the Dark Holy Gate, and the Forbidden Holy Gate.

Among them, the Forbidden Holy Gate is a force built by forbidden creatures, and almost no cultivators are accepted, only forbidden creatures are recruited.

In the Dark Sanctuary, some forbidden creatures are neutral and do not make enemies with cultivators, so they have established the Forbidden Holy Gate, and the other nine Holy Gates will not deal with it, and the strength of the Forbidden Holy Gate is very strong, and the other Holy Gates will not be bored with trouble with the Forbidden Holy Gate.

And the Dark Holy Gate is the oldest Holy Gate, and its strength is not necessarily the strongest, but its heritage is deep enough.

In addition to the Forbidden Holy Gate, the other nine Holy Gates are likely to recruit Ye Tian.

Soon, a Domain Ancestor clone of the First Holy Gate descended on the Battle Realm Tower.

"Hello, I'm from the Dragon Brave Domain Ancestor of the Immortal Holy Gate!"

A domain ancestor clone appeared in front of Ye Tian and introduced himself.

"Long Yong Domain Ancestor, hello!"

Ye Tian also greeted politely.

"Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor, our Immortal Holy Gate has issued an invitation to you, once you join our Immortal Holy Gate, you can directly become a Holy Son and enjoy the treatment of a Holy Son!"

Long Yong Yu Ancestor said.

Subsequently, Long Yong Domain Ancestor said a lot of conditions.

However, at this time, another Domain Ancestor of the Holy Gate found Ye Tian.

"Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor, I am the Radiant Heaven Domain Ancestor from the Holy Gate of All Things!" the Bright Heaven Domain Ancestor of the Holy Gate of All Things introduced himself.

"Yaotian Domain Ancestor, our Immortal Holy Gate came first, you are not like this, right?"

Long Yong Domain Ancestor said unpleasantly.

He knew the Ancestor of the Yaotian Domain, after all, they were both the Ten Great Holy Gates, and they naturally knew each other.

"Long Yong Domain Ancestor, you can come and invite the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor, we can't come, besides, he hasn't agreed to join your Immortal Holy Gate yet, right?"

Yaotian Domain Ancestor said.

Long Yongyu Ancestor was angry, but he couldn't refute it.

That's right, Ye Tian hasn't said to join yet, and the other Holy Gates can naturally continue to invite Ye Tian.

Subsequently, one by one, the domain ancestor clones of the Holy Gate arrived, all of them came to invite Ye Tian to join the Holy Gate, which showed that Ye Tian's talent really shocked the Holy Gate one by one.

However, as the owner of the Battle Tower, the Battle Gate was the last to arrive.

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, I am the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor of the Battle Gate!"

The domain ancestor of the battle gate spoke.

"I've seen the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor!"

"I've seen the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor!"

"I've seen the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor!"

One of the other Eight Holy Sects said respectfully.

The other domain ancestors who came from the Holy Gate were all Supreme Domain Ancestors, and the Supreme Domain Ancestors invited Ye Tian, which was enough to value Ye Tian, after all, the Supreme Domain Ancestor was also a big man in the Dark Holy Domain, and he was almost the status of the lord of a city, which was enough to establish the power of a city.

However, the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor is different, he is not the strongest Domain Ancestor, but the Invincible Domain Ancestor, and it is not an ordinary Invincible Domain Ancestor, but a terrifying existence that has killed many Invincible Domain Ancestors, and his combat power is extremely terrifying, far from an existence that they can compare!

They were very surprised, just the first place in the list of all things, even if they had the Extreme Dao Inheritance and the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, there was no need to alarm a big man like the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, right?

Ye Tian saw that the other domain ancestors were so respectful, and he also knew that the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor was extraordinary, and it was definitely not an ordinary domain ancestor.

"I've seen the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor!"

Ye Tian also said politely.

At this time, the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor spoke: "Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, I don't know what conditions the other Holy Gates give you. Let me talk about the conditions of our battle gate, once you join the battle gate, you will enjoy the status of the Holy Son, and our war gate will teach you the Black Yuan Holy Body Inheritance and the Forbidden Heaven Holy Body Inheritance, which are in the same vein as the Mixed Yuan Holy Body Inheritance, and are the three holy bodies created by an indescribable existence. Once you have cultivated the Three Holy Bodies, you can synthesize a Holy Body, the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, which is the First Holy Body of the Dark Sanctuary. In addition, our Battle Gate can also provide unlimited resources for you to cultivate the Holy Body to the Dacheng Realm, which is the condition of our Battle Gate!"

"Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, Mixed Yuan Holy Body, Black Yuan Holy Body, and Forbidden Heaven Holy Body, these three holy bodies are almost impossible to cultivate, and your battle gate has no auxiliary things, it is all luck that the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor can cultivate the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, you let him cultivate the Black Yuan Holy Body and the Forbidden Heaven Holy Body again, that is looking for death! Do you want to destroy a demonic genius?"

Long Yong Domain Ancestor frowned.

Immediately, the other Men of the Holy Gate were ready to watch the play!

They felt that the conditions of the Battle Gate did not have an advantage at all, although the Battle Gate had a complete inheritance of the three holy bodies, which was an advantage, but who would dare to cultivate these three holy bodies?

They wouldn't think that Ye Tian would choose the Battle Gate, except for this Holy Body Inheritance, the conditions of the Battle Gate were not as good as their major Holy Gates.

However, Ye Tian said, "Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, I am willing to join the Battle Gate!"

Rumble!!!!

The other domain ancestors were shocked, and they couldn't control their breath one by one.

However, the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor smiled, as if he had already known that Ye Tian would choose the Battle Gate.

Other people may not know about the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, but in fact, the Battle Gate understands very well, if it is not with the help of auxiliary things, if someone can practice the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, it is inherently suitable for the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, and they can also have a great hope of cultivating the Black Yuan Holy Body and the Forbidden Heaven Holy Body.

Therefore, once this condition is opened, Ye Tian will inevitably agree.

However, the people of the Battle Gate didn't know at all that Ye Tian could copy his body and try again and again, so that he could cultivate into a Mixed Yuan Holy Body, and it was not as inherently suitable for cultivating the Eternal Immortal Holy Body as the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor imagined!

Ye Tian agreed to join the Battle Gate, and although the people from the other Holy Gates were puzzled, they still left one by one.

At this time, they even hoped that Ye Tian would fall while cultivating the Three Great Holy Bodies, so that the Battle Gate would lose a demonic genius and have to lose some resources.
